Container.Name: AppFlowy-Postgres
Container.Overview: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension — the primary database for AppFlowy Cloud. Deploy this first. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
PostgreSQL 16 with the pgvector extension, used as the primary relational database for AppFlowy Cloud.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Prerequisite: Create a custom Docker network named appflowy before installing any container. In Unraid go to Settings > Docker > Custom Networks, or run: docker network create appflowy

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for PostgreSQL. Must be on a path with enough free space.

Config.Name: Postgres User
Config.Description: PostgreSQL superuser username. Must match the value used in all other AppFlowy services.

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: PostgreSQL superuser password. Change this before first start. Must match all other AppFlowy services.

Config.Name: Postgres Port (internal)
Config.Description: PostgreSQL port. Exposed to the appflowy Docker network only. Change host port only if you need external access.

Config.Name: PGPORT
Config.Description: Port PostgreSQL listens on inside the container. Keep in sync with the port mapping above.
